title: Near-Term Quantum Machine Learning
description: Explore practical QML applications on NISQ devices. Understand the constraints, opportunities, and realistic expectations for quantum machine learning in the near term.
learningObjectives: Define NISQ constraints and their impact on QML
Apply error mitigation strategies for improved results
Evaluate realistic expectations for NISQ-era QML
Design QML experiments suitable for current hardware
Navigate the landscape of available quantum hardware
